\documentclass{article}
\usepackage[backend=biber,style=authoryear]{biblatex}
\addbibresource{bib/refs.bib}

\title{biblatex + biber, with .bib in subdirectory}
\author{Test Author}

\begin{document}
\maketitle

\section{Introduction}
This fixture exercises the biber code path in \texttt{\textbackslash compile}
and the subdirectory \texttt{\textbackslash addbibresource} handling shipped
together. The bibliography file lives at \texttt{bib/refs.bib} rather than
the project root, which historically broke \texttt{find\_used\_bib\_files}.

The relevant work appears in \autocite{einstein1905, smith2020, doe2024}.

\printbibliography
\end{document}
